final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit shift register with an asynchronous active-low reset and shift disable.
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input in_bit,
    output reg [3:0] out
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (reset) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        out <= {out[2:0], in_bit};
    end
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit shift register with an asynchronous active-low reset and shift disable.
